installCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory /vercel/path0 && git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/flutter && curl -fsSL https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.32.0-stable.tar.xz | tar -xJ -C /opt && export PATH=$PATH:/opt/flutter/bin && flutter pub get
